_comment: 本体论 SQL 模板库 - 按 MECE 五层组织

foundation.label: 基础层
foundation.description: 核心概念定义 — Object Type / Link Type 的结构与约束

templates.label: 创建对象类型表
templates.description: id、name、description 三列

templates.label: 创建对象实例表
templates.description: object_type_id 指向类型表，properties 用 JSON 存储灵活属性
templates.sql:
CREATE TABLE life_object (
    id             INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    object_type_id INTEGER REFERENCES life_object_type(id),
    name           VARCHAR NOT NULL,
    properties     JSON    DEFAULT '{}',
    annotations    VARCHAR DEFAULT ''
);

templates.label: 创建关系类型表
templates.description: 和对象类型表结构相同，但语义不同

templates.label: 创建关系实例表
templates.description: 三个外键 + weight 表示关系强度 0.0~1.0
templates.sql:
CREATE TABLE life_link (
    id               INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    link_type_id     INTEGER REFERENCES life_link_type(id),
    source_object_id INTEGER REFERENCES life_object(id),
    target_object_id INTEGER REFERENCES life_object(id),
    weight           DECIMAL(3,2) DEFAULT 1.0
);

templates.label: 创建行动表
templates.description: status 控制状态机：pending→in_progress→executed
templates.sql:
CREATE TABLE life_action (
    id          INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
    object_id   INTEGER,
    name        VARCHAR NOT NULL,
    description VARCHAR,
    status      VARCHAR DEFAULT 'pending',
    execute_at  DATE
);

relations.label: 关系层
relations.description: 关系实例建模 — Link 实例 CRUD + 权重调整

templates.label: 插入对象类型
templates.description: 三个预设类型
templates.sql:
INSERT INTO life_object_type VALUES
    (1, 'Aspect', '生活维度'),
    (2, 'Person', '人物'),
    (3, 'Goal',   '目标');

templates.label: 插入对象实例
templates.description: 四个核心对象
templates.sql:
INSERT INTO life_object (id, object_type_id, name, properties) VALUES
    (1, 1, '心态', '{"state": "焦虑", "goal": "内心平静"}'),
    (2, 1, '工作', '{"role": "工程师", "struggle": "沟通"}'),
    (3, 1, '家庭', '{"priority": "最高"}'),
    (4, 1, '身体', '{"state": "还行", "goal": "健康"}');

templates.label: 插入关系类型
templates.description: 四种核心关系
templates.sql:
INSERT INTO life_link_type VALUES
    (1, '影响', 'A 作用于 B，强度可量化'),
    (2, '养活', 'A 为 B 提供物质基础'),
    (3, '锚定', 'A 为 B 提供精神支撑'),
    (4, '支撑', 'A 为 B 提供基础条件');

templates.label: 插入关系实例
templates.description: 心态→影响→工作(0.9)，工作→养活→家庭(1.0)，家庭→锚定→心态(0.8)，身体→支撑→心态(0.7)

templates.label: 调整关系权重（反思后）
templates.description: 权重不是一成不变的，定期反思后可以调整
templates.sql:
UPDATE life_link
SET weight = 0.6
WHERE source_object_id = (SELECT id FROM life_object WHERE name = '心态')
  AND target_object_id = (SELECT id FROM life_object WHERE name = '工作');

templates.label: 标记行动已执行
templates.description: 执行完一个行动后更新状态

methodology.label: 方法层
methodology.description: 建模方法论 — 反思流程、数据清理、导出导入

templates.label: 反思流程：关系 → 行动
templates.description: 将关系转化为行动建议
templates.sql:
SELECT
    src.name || ' --(' || lt.name || ')--> ' || tgt.name AS 关系,
    ll.weight,
    CASE
        WHEN ll.weight < 0.5 THEN '建议：重新评估关系价值'
        WHEN ll.weight < 0.7 THEN '建议：定期维护'
        ELSE '关系稳固，继续保持'
    END AS 行动建议
FROM life_link ll
JOIN life_link_type lt ON ll.link_type_id = lt.id
JOIN life_object src ON ll.source_object_id = src.id
JOIN life_object tgt ON ll.target_object_id = tgt.id;

templates.label: 本体论状态总览
templates.description: 用 UNION ALL 统计各表行数
templates.sql:
SELECT '对象类型' AS 指标, COUNT(*) AS 数值 FROM life_object_type
UNION ALL
SELECT '对象实例',         COUNT(*)        FROM life_object
UNION ALL
SELECT '关系类型',         COUNT(*)        FROM life_link_type
UNION ALL
SELECT '关系实例',         COUNT(*)        FROM life_link
UNION ALL
SELECT '待执行行动',       COUNT(*)        FROM life_action WHERE status = 'pending';

templates.label: 清空数据（保留表结构）
templates.description: TRUNCATE 比 DELETE 快很多，适合重新初始化数据

templates.label: 删除所有表（反向依赖顺序）
templates.description: 先删子表，再删父表（外键约束顺序）

patterns.label: 模式层
patterns.description: 核心模式 — 递归追溯、视图封装、聚合分析

templates.label: CTE：带权重的完整关系视图
templates.description: 封装关系 JOIN + CASE 分级，后续可直接 SELECT * FROM relation_view
templates.sql:
WITH relation_view AS (
    SELECT
        src.name  AS source,
        lt.name   AS relation,
        tgt.name  AS target,
        ll.weight AS weight,
        CASE
            WHEN ll.weight >= 0.9 THEN '核心'
            WHEN ll.weight >= 0.7 THEN '重要'
            ELSE '一般'
        END AS importance
    FROM life_link ll
    JOIN life_link_type lt ON ll.link_type_id  = lt.id
    JOIN life_object  src ON ll.source_object_id = src.id
    JOIN life_object  tgt ON ll.target_object_id = tgt.id
)
SELECT * FROM relation_view ORDER BY weight DESC;

templates.label: 递归追溯：从 A 出发的所有影响路径
templates.description: 递归 CTE 追溯影响链，depth 限制防止无限递归
templates.sql:
WITH RECURSIVE impact_chain AS (
    SELECT
        source_object_id AS start_id,
        target_object_id AS current_id,
        CAST(src.name || ' -> ' || tgt.name AS VARCHAR) AS path,
        1 AS depth
    FROM life_link ll
    JOIN life_object src ON ll.source_object_id = src.id
    JOIN life_object tgt ON ll.target_object_id = tgt.id
    WHERE src.name = '心态'

    UNION ALL

    SELECT
        ic.start_id,
        ll.target_object_id,
        ic.path || ' -> ' || tgt.name,
        ic.depth + 1
    FROM impact_chain ic
    JOIN life_link ll ON ll.source_object_id = ic.current_id
    JOIN life_object tgt ON ll.target_object_id = tgt.id
    WHERE ic.depth < 10
      AND ic.path NOT LIKE '%' || tgt.name || '%'
)
SELECT * FROM impact_chain ORDER BY depth, weight DESC;

templates.label: 创建视图：关系网络
templates.description: 视图将三表 JOIN 固化，之后直接 SELECT * FROM v_relation_network
templates.sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW v_relation_network AS
SELECT
    src.name  AS source_object,
    lt.name   AS relation_type,
    tgt.name  AS target_object,
    ll.weight AS relation_weight
FROM life_link ll
JOIN life_link_type lt ON ll.link_type_id  = lt.id
JOIN life_object  src ON ll.source_object_id = src.id
JOIN life_object  tgt ON ll.target_object_id = tgt.id;

templates.label: 使用视图查询
templates.description: 基于视图做二次过滤

templates.label: 每种关系的数量和平均强度
templates.description: 了解哪种关系类型使用最频繁
templates.sql:
SELECT
    lt.name           AS 关系类型,
    COUNT(ll.id)      AS 实例数,
    AVG(ll.weight)    AS 平均强度,
    MAX(ll.weight)    AS 最强,
    MIN(ll.weight)    AS 最弱
FROM life_link_type lt
LEFT JOIN life_link ll ON lt.id = ll.link_type_id
GROUP BY lt.id, lt.name
ORDER BY 实例数 DESC;

templates.label: 最核心的关系（Top 3）
templates.description: 找出权重最高的三条关系
templates.sql:
SELECT
    src.name || ' --(' || lt.name || ')--> ' || tgt.name AS 关系链,
    ll.weight AS 强度
FROM life_link ll
JOIN life_link_type lt ON ll.link_type_id = lt.id
JOIN life_object src ON ll.source_object_id = src.id
JOIN life_object tgt ON ll.target_object_id = tgt.id
ORDER BY ll.weight DESC
LIMIT 3;

domains.label: 领域层
domains.description: 垂直领域 — 种子数据导入 + 完整初始化

templates.label: 一键完整初始化
templates.description: 建表 + 导入种子数据，开启完整体验
